name: BaseCaseMultiply
label: Algorithm 12

inputs.name: a0
inputs.description: Constant term of first degree-1 polynomial modulo q

inputs.name: a1
inputs.description: Linear term of first degree-1 polynomial modulo q

inputs.name: b0
inputs.description: Constant term of second degree-1 polynomial modulo q

inputs.name: b1
inputs.description: Linear term of second degree-1 polynomial modulo q

inputs.name: gamma
inputs.description: Quadratic modulus X^2 - gamma modulo q

outputs.name: c0
outputs.description: Constant term of product modulo q

outputs.name: c1
outputs.description: Linear term of product modulo q

body_raw: c0 ← a0 ⋅ b0 + a1 ⋅ b1 ⋅ gamma mod q
c1 ← a0 ⋅ b1 + a1 ⋅ b0 mod q
